allow: Bash(pwsh.exe -Command 'Get-ItemProperty HKLM:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall\\* | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match '\\''antigravity'\\'' -or $_.DisplayName -match '\\''gravity'\\'' } | Select-Object DisplayName, InstallLocation, DisplayVersion')
